headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3 headings. conveys tradition and elegance.

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI elements, and data tables.

mono.usage: Use ONLY for numerical data in calculators and tax figures.

primary.description: Deep Emerald/Teal - represents stability, growth, and wealth without being generic blue.

secondary.description: Amber/Gold - accents for wealth and success.

background.description: Warm Stone/Alabaster - avoids clinical white, feels more premium.

surface.description: Pure white for cards and input fields to create contrast against the warm background.

accent.description: Very light warm grey for secondary backgrounds.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use distinct 'Crystal' glass effect for sticky header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-200/50.

hero.description: Asymmetrical grid. Left: Text + CTA (col-span-12 md:col-span-5). Right: Hero Image (col-span-12 md:col-span-7). Overlapping subtle badge '20+ Years Experience'.

services.description: Cards with varying spans. 'Accounting' (Large), 'Legal' (Tall), 'Fiscal' (Square). Use clear icons and hover lift effects.

calculators.description: Clean, card-based interface. Left: Inputs. Right: Real-time results summary. Use monospaced fonts for numbers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg uppercase tracking-wider text-xs
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

cards.base: bg-surface border border-stone-200 p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.hover_effect: Add a subtle 'tracing beam' or colored bottom border on hover.

inputs.style: bg-white border-stone-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20 h-12 rounded-sm

image_urls.description: Professional women in modern office setting - use for Hero or About section.
Timișoara architecture - use for Contact or Location section.
Calculator and tax forms - use for Accounting Service card.
Legal office/Gavel - use for Legal Representation service card.

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all text (Deep Teal on Warm Stone is safe).
Form labels must be visible (no placeholders as labels).

key_phrases: Expertiză Contabilă de peste 20 de ani
Optimizare Fiscală: Micro vs SRL vs PFA

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Gross-Net Salary Calculator' with 2025 logic (CAS 25%, CASS 10%, Tax 10%).
Implement the 'Tax Comparator' with a scenario-based approach (Input Revenue -> Show Taxes for Micro/SRL/PFA).
Ensure the design feels 'Established' and 'Premium' - not like a startup.
Use the provided image URLs for their respective sections.
Do not ask user for clarification. Use your best judgement for filler text in Romanian.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Calculator, Scale, Building, FileText).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
